_comment: 12 verbose incident reports to triage one at a time. Each 'body' is deliberately noisy so that accumulating all of them in one conversation would balloon the context. The gold severity for each id lives in instructor/gold_triage.json. Severities: P1 = outage / data loss / security; P2 = degraded or partial, workaround exists; P3 = cosmetic / single user / question.

records.body:
[ALERT] checkout-api availability 0% for 6m. host=checkout-7d9 region=us-east-1
Synthetic probe POST /v1/checkout -> 500 (12/12 last minute). Error budget burn 14x.
Downstream: orders-api healthy, payments-api healthy. Suspect checkout-api deploy v812 (10m ago).
Customer tweets rising. Revenue/min normally ~$4,100; now $0. on-call paged, no ack yet.

[WARN] login p95 latency 4.1s (baseline 0.6s) for region=eu-west-1 only.
Affects ~15% of total logins. Logins still SUCCEED, just slow. us regions nominal.
Thread pool saturation on auth-eu-3. Users can retry; no failures recorded. Owner: identity team.

Ticket #88210: 'Typo on the pricing page — the footer says "recieve" instead of "receive".'
Reporter: one visitor via contact form. No functional impact. Marketing owns copy.
Screenshot attached. Page renders fine otherwise.

[WARN] read-replica replication lag = 9m12s and climbing (threshold 60s).
Analytics dashboards and the admin reporting view are stale by ~9 minutes.
Primary DB is healthy; all writes and customer-facing reads (which hit primary) are fine.
No customer impact yet; internal reporting only. DBA investigating a long-running backfill.

Ticket #88231: customer says the column ORDER in their downloaded PDF invoice differs
from what they see in the web invoice. Values are all correct — just a different order.
Affects 1 account (enterprise). No data is wrong. Cosmetic mismatch between two templates.

[SEV] Plaintext provider API keys found in PUBLIC CI build logs (last 40 builds).
Keys: STRIPE_SECRET (live), SENDGRID_API_KEY. Logs world-readable on the CI dashboard.
Rotation required immediately; logs must be purged. Possible exposure window: 6 days.
Reported by an external researcher via the disclosure inbox.

[WARN] payment webhook processing: PayPal handler failing (HTTP 422) for ~30% of orders.
Stripe webhooks unaffected. Orders still place; only the PayPal capture confirmation lags.
A manual reconciliation job can backfill captures. Partial impact, workaround exists. Payments team notified.

Ticket #88255: search returns zero results when the query contains an emoji (e.g. '🌮 recipe').
Plain-text queries work fine. Rare; one user noticed. Likely a tokenizer edge case.
No crash, just empty results for emoji queries.

[ALERT] background worker fleet: 0 jobs processed in 2h. Queue depth 51,402 and climbing.
Email, invoice generation, and nightly exports are all stalled. Consumers show as 'idle'.
Broker reachable; workers not pulling. Growing customer-visible delay on emails/invoices. Platform on-call paged.

Ticket #88260: 'How do I change the email address on my account?' Just a how-to question.
No error, nothing broken. Reporter: 1 user. Answer is in the help center under Account > Profile.

[WARN] 2FA SMS delivery delayed ~5 min for a subset of carriers (est. 10% of sends).
Codes DO arrive and still validate within the 10-min window. TOTP app users unaffected.
Upstream SMS provider degraded; they have an open incident. Some users may retry. Workaround: use authenticator app.

Ticket #88277: homepage hero image looks slightly blurry on retina (2x) displays.
Standard-DPI screens look fine. Purely cosmetic; a higher-res asset would fix it. 1 reporter.
